about.title: About Kora
about.p1: Kora (كورة) is a bilingual Arabic and English football portal focused on FIFA World Cup 2026, live scores, national teams, and global football news.
about.p2: We aggregate trusted RSS sources and live data via a secure server-side football API proxy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: For editorial, partnerships, or technical enquiries, reach out to our team.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We respect your privacy. This site uses essential cookies for locale preferences and analytics may be added in production.
privacy.p2: We do not sell personal data. Contact us to request data removal.

advertise.title: Advertise with Kora
advertise.p1: Reach football fans across the Arab world and English-speaking audiences with display and sponsored content.
advertise.p2: Contact us for media kit and rate card.
